channel.title: Hainesnoids's Blog of Awesomeness
channel.description: The best blog with all the awesomeness included.

item.title: i'm back
item.description:
I decided to update the main site again. Soon enough I'll rewrite this entire site from the ground up, but for now here's an update that totally deserved to release.

Changelog:
  • moved hit counter to phonehome.ws4k.net
  • replace thinliquid button with lyra.horse button
  • update favorite albums section
  • item 4


pro tip: in firefox: press Alt, then go to View > Page Style :3
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: post jumpscare
item.description: come check it out THE OLD SITE IS BACK! also haiii :3
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: update
item.description:
it's been almost a month since i've posted anything here. i haven't had much motivation to do web development ever since i rediscovered some of my old hobbies, and eventually schoolwork will get in the way of that too.

while i was gone, i made Ichi, one of my first actual discord bots. i also did a rewrite of the fanblog website.

i should post here more often when summer comes, so stay tuned for that.
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: new website!
item.description: i redesigned the website! also hi
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: how to use bluetooth headphones on chromebook kiosk apps
item.description: on the login screen, pair or connect your headphones, then enter the kiosk app.
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: status
item.description: i think nina from fanblog made my nonbinary
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: bouncecamera updates
item.description: you can now view a photo by double-clicking it (via user feedback), and download it from the same screen (via a litterbox link).
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: I'm back!
item.description: i'm back to writing stuff on the blog, and my birthday is tomorrow! i recently got a new setup, and spring break is next week, so all is good. stay silly :3
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: Network-based firewalls and why they suck ass
item.description:
My school has network-wide site blocks, yet they barely use them (since they have goguardian for the students). Examples include all of neocities, certain youtube downloaders, and other presets defined by Cisco and Comcast Business.

But it is extremely easy to bypass these filters (since they are applied on the network). Just don't use Comcast's DNS (75.75.75.75, 75.75.76.76), and set up the world's simplest proxy.
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: today is thursday,
item.description: and it's probably gonna be a boring one.
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: amercia in 2025
item.description:
> trump announces tariffs for every country in the world
> markets tank
> trump announces tariff pause for all countries but china
> markets soar
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: table of 26 shenanigans - part 1
item.description: our entire lunch table started watching the minecraft movie because i torrented it 2 days ago lol
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: Has trump caused a pre-order drought in the US?
item.description: Nintendo delayed switch 2 pre-orders in the US due to the tariffs, and Framework has recently done the same thing for a similar reason (keep in mind, pre-orders for both were to open on the same day). If this means pre-orders for both open up on my birthday that's fine, but idk about everything else.
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: upcoming video might be delayed
item.description: i cannot get my voice to sound good, so next week's video might get delayed. but hey the script and thumbnail are done so its not THAT bad.
item.author: hainesnoids

item.title: welcome to the blog!
item.description: i plan to use this a lot, so yeah, uuh, expect that.
